contradicting_evidence: Analytic Resistance:** Persistent conflation of hermeneutic circle with "subjectivism" (e.g., Dennett’s critiques of "phenomenological illusion").
Methodological Drift:** Overemphasis on *Gadamerian* fusion of horizons obscures Heidegger’s *ontological* turn (e.g., treating *Being and Time* as a "methodology manual").

Ethical Tensions:** OHIF’s focus on *pre-reflective* understanding risks neglecting structural oppression (e.g., critical race theorists argue Heidegger’s "everydayness" ignores racialized embodiment).

Dual-Track Pedagogy:** Pair *Sein und Zeit* with Heidegger’s *Black Notebooks* (critically) to confront his political failures, then transition to contemporary integrators (e.g., Dreyfus on skillful coping; Carman on *Being and Time*’s ontological priority).
Policy Mechanism:** Mandate "Ontological Literacy" modules in grad qualifying exams, requiring students to demonstrate grasp of *Vollzug* (enactment) vs. *Vorstellung* (representation).
Hiring:** Require continental departments to hire scholars working on *ontological hermeneutics* (e.g., circularity in tech ethics, environmental philosophy).
Research Grants:** NSF/NEH joint funding for projects like *"Algorithmic Hermeneutics: Circularity in AI Training Data."*
conj.subtopic: Trace the hermeneutic circle's transformation from error to structure of Being
